news.t: Leaner Focus on Value Could Propel This ETF

holdings.infoBox: FLV is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marsh & McLennan Companies stock at 4.58%, Duke Energy at 3.62%, Berkshire Hathaway at 3.41%, BlackRock at 3.19%, and Johnson & Johnson at 3.15%.

overview.description: The American Century Focused Large Cap Value ETF (FLV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed, non-transparent ETF that invests in a narrow selection of US large-cap value companies. The fund utilizes the Precidian non-transparent model. FLV was launched on Mar 31, 2020 and is issued by American Century Investments.
